description: Fast boot-marker, login, minimal VFS/procfs, and sysrace smoke target.
One-vCPU boot-marker, login, minimal VFS/procfs, and sysrace smoke target.
Login environment, uptime/uname/id/groups, /usr/bin/env, access checks, stty, basic sleep, signal, and kill probes.
Same-console logout and relogin session accounting; uptime must report one active user after relogin.
Pipes, argv/env expansion, large argv/env, and initial procfs read through the login shell.
Live non-self procfs cmdline/status coverage without shell $$ assumptions.
BusyBox IPv4 and IPv6 loopback ping through Linux raw ICMP sockets and NET0.
Focused scheduler fairness benchmark with equal CPU-bound workers and scheduler counter checks.
Rootfs stat/list/readlink, long paths, cwd/dotdot/slash resolution, procfs files, and devfs zero/urandom checks.
/tmp and /run writes, append/excl/truncate/unlink, bundled Linux regression binaries, proc tools, mount listing, mkdir basics, and dev console write.
Deep tmpfs path creation, pathmaxtest, patherrtest, and df/statfs checks.
Unionfs lower rename/copy-up, root-created upper entries, long/name-max entries, and unlink behavior from the user phase.
Tmpfs ownership, mkdir, long names, name max, touch, fifo, hardlink, rmdir, rename, chmod, chown denial, symlink, plus user-created union symlink/hardlink.
Large /dev/zero write, mmap/read stress, and user tmpfs mount lifecycle on /mnt.
Denied secret read, shell survival, backspace editing, foreground cat Ctrl-C, background watch, and exit back to login.
Root login identity/env, secret access, root unionfs lower-parent create/copy-up, and pinned-route/busy-mount guards.
Privileged chown of /tmp/bunix-write.txt and root logout; depends on tmpfs-basic-linux-tests creating the file.
Long username/password login regression and final shell regression marker.
Root-only mount/umount race soaking; clean boot preferred once implemented.
Fast one-vCPU Alpine OpenRC boot to login and guest poweroff.
Two-vCPU Alpine OpenRC boot through login, root shell, dmesg, and guest poweroff.
